description: CLI ergonomic affordances. Closes FGAP-022 (--show-schema contract preview — an early branch printing array_key/required/types/id-pattern via the lifted loadBlockSchema/resolveBlockItemSchema path, return 0, mirroring the parsed.help branch at cli.ts:464-467), FGAP-024 (append-block-item --dry-run via client-side prospective-whole-file validation lifted from file-block-item.ts:247-255, never calling appendToBlock — no op change, avoids adding dryRun to the frozen op), and FGAP-026 (granular exit codes mapping arg/usage->2, not-initialized/BootstrapNotFoundError->1, schema-absent->3, validation->5 at the cli.ts catch + UsageError sites).
notes: Release-group: cli-parity (NEXT) | order 3/5 | addresses FGAP-022, FGAP-024, FGAP-026 | category: CLI-only-shared-helper (R-0003)
